summary: Runx agency-health skill (v0.1.0) built, harness-green (4/4 cases), published to hosted registry, dogfooded with a sealed receipt. This is a REDELIVERY of bounty #106 (claim e29c5382-dd80-4d3b-b697-723e5bae448c) fixing the prior machine-verification failure: the skill had never been published, so public_url (runx.ai/x/mamonisme/agency-health) returned HTTP 404 and the hosted harness 404'd. Now published; public_url resolves and hosted harness passes.

observations.note: Published to hosted registry. NOTE: registry uses content-SHA version; canonical public_url is version-less.
Open PR contains skills/agency-health/SKILL.md, X.yaml, tools/agency-health.mjs, tools/load_case.mjs, fixtures.
Raw fetchable from PR head commit.

observations.output: passed (publish succeeded only because hosted harness passed)
observations.note: Hosted registry reruns harness after publish.

observations.command: runx skill mamonisme/agency-health@sha-ce6cc60ad96e --registry https://api.runx.ai --json -i case_id=case-stalled-002 -i agency_ref=health-dev -i store_id=health-dev -i data_source_ref=local://runx-agency/health-dev
observations.output: sealed; decision=ready; health_verdict.status=degraded; finding stalled_turns (3 turns s2,s3,s4) -> intervention target_lane=human
valid=false; digest=valid; content_address=valid; signature=local-development(invalid offline — requires prod trust-tier keys not present on this VPS); lineage=unverified(single receipt)
observations.note: Documented limitation: offline single-receipt verify cannot exercise the hosted trust-tier signature. Digest + content-address are cryptographically valid; the seal was emitted by the runx local runtime. Hosted/CI run would verify with prod keys.

observations.refused_reason: no readable case events over period -> decision=needs_more_evidence, no findings, no intervention (case no-case-events-stop)
